overview: Renew Medical Centers offers regenerative medicine treatments using autologous and allograft therapies to treat chronic pain conditions and hair loss without surgery.
highlights: Treatment for neuropathy, joint pain, back pain, and hair loss
Stem cell therapy, PRP, and growth factor allograft options
Minimally invasive procedures requiring no anesthesia
targetAudience: Patients with chronic pain or hair loss concerns, particularly those unsuitable for traditional surgery.
